summary: Completed PaymentScreen theme testing. All 8 test scenarios PASSED. PaymentScreen correctly applies conditional neumorphic background based on theme mode. Light mode shows off-white (#f0f5f9), dark mode shows navy (#0f172a). Text readability verified in both modes. Keypad modal numbers visible in both modes.
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentScreen.js line 121: neoBg correctly computed as isMinimalist ? (isNeoDark ? neoColors.neoDarkBg : neoColors.neoBgColor) : null
PaymentScreen.js line 1103: background style correctly uses conditional: isMinimalist ? neoBg : original gradient
Loading/error states (lines 997, 1008, 1023-1024) also use conditional background - working correctly
Background orbs in lines 1107-1118 are conditional based on isMinimalist - renders neumorphic glow for minimalist, purple/blue orbs for original
theme-minimalist.css properly overrides bg-slate-9/8 backgrounds to var(--neo-bg) for modal compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: PaymentScreen theme integration verified working. Theme currently left in Minimalist Light mode. All conditional backgrounds (main screen, loading, error, business day block) render correctly based on isMinimalist and isNeoDark states.

payment_screen_light_mode_bg.description: Background is off-white rgb(240, 245, 249) when minimalist light mode active

payment_screen_dark_mode_bg.description: Background is navy rgb(15, 23, 42) when minimalist dark mode active

payment_screen_original_theme.description: Original theme shows dark gradient background (linear-gradient 135deg from #0f0f23 through purple tones)

text_readability_light_mode.description: Text color rgba(29, 40, 58, 0.7) - dark slate on light background - excellent contrast

text_readability_dark_mode.description: Text color rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) - white on dark background - excellent contrast

keypad_modal_dark_mode.description: Keypad numbers visible - white (rgb(255,255,255)) on dark navy modal background

keypad_modal_light_mode.description: Keypad numbers visible - dark (rgb(29,40,58)) on off-white modal background

theme_toggle_persistence.description: Theme toggle correctly switches PaymentScreen background between dark and light modes

visual_verification_details.neumorphic_shadows: Visible on payment method cards with LED glow effect
visual_verification_details.spanish_ui_labels: FORMAS DE PAGO, MONTOS RAPIDOS, PROCESAR PAGO all in Spanish

code_implementation_verified.neo_bg_computation_line_121: const neoBg = isMinimalist ? (isNeoDark ? neoColors.neoDarkBg : neoColors.neoBgColor) : null
code_implementation_verified.conditional_orbs_lines_1107_1118: isMinimalist renders neo-bg-orb with neoGlowColor, else renders purple/blue/cyan gradient orbs
